---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for AutonomOS
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: Omkar0612
---

## Feature Summary

A concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this should work. Include any UI/UX ideas if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches or workarounds you've tried?

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, examples from other tools, or anything else that helps explain the request.
